title: 100 Pcs 5 Inch Green Mini Latex Balloons for Christmas Birthday Party Decorations - Small Round Helium Balloons
features: 【Safe & durable】These green small balloons are made from high quality latex.durable and beautiful. Non-toxic and environmentally friendly, Each balloons have been rigorously tested, durable and no strange smell.

【Wide range of uses】These 5 inch Latex Balloons are perfect for Christmas party, Birthday, Baby shower, Festivals Decorations, schools, shopping malls, offices, door decorations and bars, It is an indispensable element for your party.
【Support Air & Helium】The green Mini balloons can be filled with air or helium, when you inflate the balloons, Do not fill it too much to prevent bursting

【Happy DIY Time 】You can hang or stick these green 5 inch balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, Also use with other colours or sizes of balloons to create a beautiful balloon arch, balloon column,or multiple balloon bouquets, create more usages by using your imagination, Enjoy a fun DIY time with your family.

【After sales service】Our main aim is to satisfy our customers and provide a good shopping experience. If you have any problems with our products, you can contact us at any time and we will refund you in full.Your problem can be solved within 24 hours.
description: Product description The green balloons are made of natural high quality latex, which is non-toxic and safe material, It's safe to use around people Wide range of application These attractive balloons are perfect for Christmas, wedding decorations, festival party decorations, birthday decorations, anniversary decorations, carnival decorations. You can use these balloons together with other colours or sizes to create a beautiful balloon arch, Make your party even more exciting, your family and friends will have great memories. Specification: Color: Matte green balloons Material: Natural high quality latex Size: 5 Inch (12.7CM) Type of gas supported: Air and helium Package Included: 5 Inch green Latex party balloons * 100PCS Please Note: 1.Please do not overfill the balloons, you only need to fill 90% of the space of balloons to fully expand the balloon. 2. AVOID direct sunlight, heat. AVOID excessive friction. INDOOR use recommended! 3. CHOKING DANGER - Children under the age of 8 can suffocate or choke on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Safety Warning Choking Hazard - Balloon
